Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ESTHER LERNER Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. Appearances: Stacey Poole, Esq., of the Lerner Law Offices, (415) 391-6000, appearing for Petitioner, Esther R. Lerner, and moving party. There are no other appearances. Counsel is not appearing to argue. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Counsel will submit a proposed Order to the Court.
